mapper.sql: id, documents_code, documents_name, is_available, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time, usage_time, remark, pid, file_type, file_type_content
mapper.insert: insert into test_controlled_documents (id, documents_code, documents_name, is_available, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time, usage_time, remark, pid, file_type, file_type_content, documents_file_uri) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{documentsCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{documentsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{usageTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fileType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fileTypeContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{documentsFileUri,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into test_controlled_documents
id,
documents_code,
documents_name,
is_available,
status,
del_flag,
create_time,
update_time,
usage_time,
remark,
pid,
file_type,
file_type_content,
documents_file_uri,

#{documentsCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

mapper.update:
update test_controlled_documents
documents_code = #{documentsCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
documents_name = #{documentsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_available = #{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=CHAR},
del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
usage_time = #{usageTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pid = #{pid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
file_type = #{fileType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
file_type_content = #{fileTypeContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
documents_file_uri = #{documentsFileUri,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update test_controlled_documents set documents_code = #{documentsCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, documents_name = #{documentsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_available = #{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=CHAR}, del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, usage_time = #{usageTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pid = #{pid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, file_type = #{fileType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, file_type_content = #{fileTypeContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, documents_file_uri = #{documentsFileUri,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
